MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for order of examination of Defendant Intelligent System, Inc.

Plaintiff Robert Half International Inc. represented by Kenneth Sang, Esq.
Defendant Intelligent System, Inc. appearing by Chris Solomon, Chief Executive Officer.

Order and judgment are signed.
